reviews.comment: FWT has tinted two of my vehicles and I’m very impressed with how well the film keeps out the heat of summer! Saves me from having to blast my air conditioning, which in turn saves on gas. The staff are so friendly. The second vehicle I took to them was done early and when I started driving home I noticed a smeared set of bubbles all over the driver side window. BUT this is totally normal and it dries right up into smooth perfection after a day (or two weather depending). I took the car back to ask them about it and they explained to me that it would dry up and it’s just part of the tinting process. Of course even a few hours later the bubbles were almost gone and by next morning, undetectable. I think it’s important customers know that the tint job was not messed up, but that it just needs time to dry. I was nervous at first, but they are the professionals and know more than I do about tinting windows. At this point my dad is now asking for tinted windows from FWT to keep the heat out of his car! Soooo if you guys could stop being so good at your job because now I’m gonna have to pay for another tint job!! Lol

reviewReply.comment: Thank you so much Jackie! We look forward to seeing dad too!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNPeXMtMHZnRRAB

reviews.comment: They are an absolutely amazing family business. My truck was done super quick and the tint job came out perfectly. I waited as I didn't have anyone to pick me up and I spent some time plating pop it's and hangman with Trinity (whom is an absolute doll) they were professional, kind and the pricing was great. I couldn't be happier with my big blue truck. Will for sure get any tint work done here in the future. As someone that works for small local business I am proud to be part of such a great community of wonderful family businesses and great service!!!

reviewReply.comment: I'm so glad you had fun playing with fidget toys! LOL! Welcome to the family! <3 Thank you for coming in!

They did my car perfectly and offered their own input as they have the experience to back their well educated advice. 10/10, awesome experience; would recommend to anyone.

Edit : I've since been back to have my next vehicle tinted, after a few years the tint started peeling (common for rimless windows) but a simple call to the shop and I was scheduled to have it all fixed up. They're always super flexible and understanding. They still have my business for any tinting needs

reviews.comment: I had my two front windows tinted here. They did an amazing job! The windows look fantastic and I am more than satisfied with the results. Not only is their quality of work excellent, but their customer service is incredible! They are so personable and friendly - and that's hard to find these days. When I called for an appointment, I was able to get one almost immediately. While my windows were being tinted I was really stressed because I had my 9 year old twin sons with me, and they can be a handful sometimes - but they were incredibly accommodating to them. I would absolutely recommend Frederick Window Tinting! Any future cars I may purchase will definitely be tinted here. As I'm writing this review, my husband's car is actually in their shop!

reviewReply.comment: Thank you Lindsey! Your kids are awesome =)  I hope they had fun too!
